title: Replace custom student login with Internet Identity authentication

requirements.text: Remove the custom student login form (email + unique code fields) from the Login page. Replace it with an Internet Identity login button for students. When a student clicks the button, trigger the Internet Identity authentication flow using the existing useInternetIdentity hook. After successful authentication, check if the student's principal is approved in the backend; if approved, redirect to the student dashboard. If not yet approved, show a message that their account is pending admin approval.

quotes: Remove custom login and use Internet Identity for students only.

acceptanceCriteria: The student login section shows only an Internet Identity login button — no email field, no unique code field, no password field
Clicking the Internet Identity button initiates the Internet Identity auth flow via useInternetIdentity hook
After successful Internet Identity login, an approved student is redirected to the student dashboard
After successful Internet Identity login, a non-approved student sees a pending approval message and is not redirected to the dashboard
Admin login section (email-only, mrjain950761@gmail.com) is completely unchanged

requirements.text: Remove all remaining custom credential authentication logic for students from the backend (main.mo). Any functions that validate email + unique code combinations for student login should be removed or disabled. Student identity verification must rely solely on the caller's Internet Identity principal. Do not change any admin-related logic, payment approval logic, session management, materials management, or attendance tracking.

quotes: Remove custom login and use Internet Identity for students only.

acceptanceCriteria: No backend function accepts an email + unique code pair to authenticate a student
Student authorization checks use the caller's principal only
All other backend functions (payment approval, sessions, materials, attendance) remain unchanged

requirements.text: Update the student-facing layouts and route guards to use the Internet Identity principal (from useInternetIdentity hook) instead of any localStorage-based custom auth token or unique code for determining if a student is logged in. The StudentLayout sidebar logout button should call the Internet Identity logout function. Do not change the AdminLayout or any admin route guards.

quotes: Remove custom login and use Internet Identity for students only.

acceptanceCriteria: Student routes are protected by Internet Identity login state (isAuthenticated from useInternetIdentity)
Unauthenticated access to student routes redirects to the login page
Logout in StudentLayout calls the Internet Identity logout function and redirects to login
Admin routes and AdminLayout are completely unchanged

constraints: Do not change admin login logic — admin authenticates via hardcoded email mrjain950761@gmail.com only
Do not change UPI payment submission flow, admin approval/rejection, session management, materials management, or attendance tracking
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not add new features beyond replacing the student custom login with Internet Identity
nonGoals: Modifying the UPI payment flow or registration form
Changing student dashboard content or layout
Adding new features to session, materials, or attendance management
Implementing Internet Identity for admin users
